title: 12 Pack Blank Canvas Pencil Cases DIY Kit with 10 Stencils, 12 Pens & 3 Stickers, Zipper Drawstring Bag for Painting, Multipurpose Canvas Pouch Creative Art Craft Gift for Kids, Teens & Adults
features: COMPLETE BLANK CANVAS DIY KIT: Unleash your creativity! This ultimate pencil pouch set includes 12 blank 10oz canvas bags, 10 reusable stencils with borders, 12 colouring pens, and 3 sticker sheets (heart, flower, star). Everything you need to design unique, personalised kids pencil pouches from scratch.

10 REUSABLE STENCILS FOR PERFECT DESIGNS: Create like a pro! Our kid pencil case kit features 10 large stencils (20x6cm) with raised borders that prevent smudging and make painting easy & mess-free. Achieve stunning, crisp designs every time, even if you're not an artist!

PREMIUM HEAVY-DUTY CANVAS MATERIAL: Experience superior quality. The Canvas Pencil Cases are made from thick 10oz natural kraft canvas, our bags are more durable and sturdy than common non-woven fabric. Anstore pencil pouch kit provide a perfect, professional-grade surface for painting, ensuring your artwork lasts.

DESIGN YOUR OWN STYLE: From casual to chic! The blank beige canvas and assorted zip colours (red, yellow, green, black, blue, pink) offer a stylish, neutral base. Perfect for creating matching sets, group gifts, or expressing your unique personality through art.

THE PERFECT GIFT PACKAGED READY TO GIVE: An ideal gift for all ages. This all-in-one kit comes in elegant packaging, making it the perfect creative gift for birthdays, Christmas, or craft lovers. Great for party activities, school projects, or a satisfying DIY hobby at home.
